metadata.notes: Resolved prediction markets from February 2026. BTC crashed ~19% early month. Major events: Q4 GDP miss, US strikes Iran, nonfarm payrolls -92k.

markets.question: What price will Bitcoin hit in February 2026?
markets.outcome: BTC crashed from ~$79k to mid-$60k range. Major deleveraging event.
markets.notes: 19% drawdown driven by leverage unwind, not capitulation

markets.question: Q4 2025 GDP advance estimate
markets.outcome: 1.4% annualized (well below 2.8% forecast, down from 4.4% in Q3)
markets.notes: Originally scheduled for Jan 29, delayed due to Oct-Nov 2025 shutdown. Consumer spending and investment offset by drops in govt spending and exports.

markets.question: US strikes Iran by February 28?
markets.notes: One of largest Polymarket markets ever. 6 wallets netted $1.2M by betting on exact date. Suspicious timing (funded 24hr before strikes).

markets.question: DHS partial shutdown in February 2026?
markets.outcome: Yes - DHS funding lapsed after Feb 13 continuing resolution expired
markets.notes: Extended from the Jan 31 shutdown. DHS funded only through Feb 13.

markets.question: February 2026 Nonfarm Payrolls
markets.outcome: Unexpected decline of -92,000 jobs. Unemployment rose to 4.4%.
markets.notes: Significant negative surprise that moved recession odds higher.

markets.question: Fed decision in March 2026?
markets.notes: 11-1 vote. Governor Miran dissented favoring 25bp cut. Dot plot: 1 cut in 2026, 1 in 2027.

btc.notes: Major selloff early Feb. 19% drawdown driven by leverage unwind.
